Cheer for the Gauls!
Whether you choose to participate in a sport you’ve played for years or try something new—water polo, anyone?—Webb Athletics offers a competitive, interscholastic program for students with 15 sports and over 40 teams, spanning all skill levels. Webb traditionally qualifies teams and individual athletes for post-season competition.
Webb competes in the
California Interscholastic Athletic Association (CIF)
and proudly holds 131 league titles and three California Interscholastic Federation titles. Built on Honor, a core value of the school, Webb Athletics promotes character and self-confidence while developing leadership skills through commitment and teamwork.
–Sandy ’27
“Before I came to Webb, I would have never thought that I would join wrestling, or honestly, any sports team. I wasn't such a sports person before I came here. The wrestling team has really allowed me to be open-minded and try new things. People don't know what they can accomplish unless they try it first.”
What’s a Gaul?
Our mascot is the Gaul—it’s unique!
Gaul
[gawl]
noun
an ancient region in W Europe, including the modern areas of N Italy, France, Belgium, and the S Netherlands: consisted of two divisions, one part S of the Alps Cisalpine Gaul and another part N of the Alps Transalpine Gaul.
an inhabitant of the ancient region of Gaul.

Athletics News
List of 5 news stories.
Five Webb teams named CIF-SS Academic Team Champions
3/26/2025
Five Webb athletics teams have been named CIF Academic Team Champions for the 2024–25 school year—the most of any school in the CIF Southern Section! Each year, CIF-SS names the team with the highest average GPA in its sport the CIF-SS Academic Team Champion.
Read More
Tobey Ng ’26 appointed to CIF-SS Student-Athlete Advisory Council
3/21/2025
The CIF Southern Section has selected Tobey Ng ’26 to serve on their Student-Athlete Advisory Council. Tobey will join a group of student leaders who consult on issues related to high school sports and help with CIF events. Congratulations, Tobey!
Girls' basketball coaches team up with Coaches vs. Cancer
1/20/2025
Coach Kays and the girls' basketball coaching staff are teaming up with the American Cancer Society for Coaches vs. Cancer Suits and Sneakers Week. For next Monday's game, the coaches will swap their dress shoes for sneakers to raise awareness for the fight against cancer and to inspire hope.
Read More
Golf coach uses WebbGPT AI to elevate student practice
1/20/2025
The Webb Schools’ golf coach, Stephen Hebert, is harnessing the power of WebbGPT AI to revolutionize his coaching approach.
Read More
Fall Sports Highlights: Griffin Suttner ’25 named Runner of the Year, two teams advanced in CIF
11/22/2024
Special congratulations to Webb cross country runner Griffin Suttner ’25 for being named the San Joaquin League Boys Cross Country Runner of the Year! Great job, Griffin!
